query:
INSERT INTO public_records_requests (title, agency, description, date_sent, status, public_status) VALUES
('Sheriff Public Records Request R019298-111424', 'Washoe County Sheriff''s Office — Records Center', 'Public records request filed November 14, 2024. Response/email located in record set dated December 9, 2024.', '2024-11-14', 'partial_response', 1),
('FOIA Request — Case CR23-0657 records', 'Washoe County', 'FOIA request filed September 28, 2024. Exact agency and response status require source review.', '2024-09-28', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('FOIA Requests 1–6', 'Washoe County', 'Six FOIA requests filed October 3, 2024. Multiple requests for case-related records.', '2024-10-03', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('FOIA Requests — November 2024 batch', 'Washoe County', 'Three FOIA requests filed November 6, 2024 (FOIA, FOIA 2, FOIA 3).', '2024-11-06', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Request for transparency and records regarding CR23-0657', 'Washoe County', 'Request for transparency and records specifically regarding case CR23-0657. Filed November 8, 2024.', '2024-11-08', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Follow-up on public information request', 'Washoe County', 'Follow-up communication on prior public information request filed November 15, 2024.', '2024-11-15', 'awaiting_response', 1),
('Public accountability, procedural misconduct — FOIA Requests 1–3', 'Washoe County', 'Three FOIA requests filed December 9, 2024 addressing public accountability and procedural misconduct concerns in CR23-0657.', '2024-12-09', 'awaiting_response', 1);

-- Update the story narrative with correct case info
UPDATE stories SET
  narrative = 'The Church Record documents State of Nevada v. Cameron Doyle Church, Case No. CR23-0657, Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County, Department 8.\n\nThe case began March 12, 2023 with a Washoe County Sheriff probable-cause arrest on Grand Larceny of a Motor Vehicle charges. By August 18, 2023, the State had filed an amended complaint adding Unlawful Taking of a Motor Vehicle, obtained a waiver of preliminary examination, and transferred the matter to district court. On September 12, 2023, Church was arraigned, pleaded not guilty, and waived the 60-day trial rule with Cooper Brinson as appointed counsel.\n\nIn January 2024, Sydney Hutt (APD) replaced Brinson. By May 2024, Church had filed pro se motions — which Judge Barry L. Breslow struck because Church was represented by counsel. Hutt requested a Young hearing; the May 30, 2024 Young hearing relieved the APD office and referred the matter for conflict-counsel appointment. Galen Carrico was appointed June 3, 2024.\n\nThe December 2024 cluster is the central procedural record. On December 3, 2024, Breslow struck additional pro se filings. On December 5, 2024, at a Young hearing with DDA Aziz Merchant and Carrico present, the court ordered competency evaluations, stayed proceedings, and restricted pro se filings. On December 9, 2024, a competency order was entered nunc pro tunc to December 5. On December 16–17, 2024, the court issued an OSC and revoked pretrial release, issuing a no-bail bench warrant.\n\nIn 2025: State filed a contempt motion over pro se filings (January 6); trial was vacated pending competency (January 22); three competency evaluations were conducted (Coyle, Pinkerman, Foerster — May through June 2025); defendant was found competent and remanded July 1, 2025. Counsel continued to cycle: Figueroa moved to withdraw June 2025 (granted August 21, 2025 with another no-bail warrant issued); Joel Merchant substituted July 2025.\n\nNote: CR22-2227 appears in prior system records but is not confirmed by any located source document. All source materials identify this case as CR23-0657. A supervised-release acknowledgment also references CR23-0687 — a clerical discrepancy preserved in the record.',
  case_number = 'CR23-0657'
WHERE id = 60001;

-- Update the story narrative with correct case info
UPDATE stories SET
  narrative = 'The Church Record documents State of Nevada v. Cameron Doyle Church, Case No. CR23-0657, Second Judicial District Court, Washoe County, Department 8.\n\nThe case began March 12, 2023 with a Washoe County Sheriff probable-cause arrest on Grand Larceny of a Motor Vehicle charges. By August 18, 2023, the State had filed an amended complaint adding Unlawful Taking of a Motor Vehicle, obtained a waiver of preliminary examination, and transferred the matter to district court. On September 12, 2023, Church was arraigned, pleaded not guilty, and waived the 60-day trial rule with Cooper Brinson as appointed counsel.\n\nIn January 2024, Sydney Hutt (APD) replaced Brinson. By May 2024, Church had filed pro se motions — which Judge Barry L. Breslow struck because Church was represented by counsel. Hutt requested a Young hearing; the May 30, 2024 Young hearing relieved the APD office and referred the matter for conflict-counsel appointment. Galen Carrico was appointed June 3, 2024.\n\nThe December 2024 cluster is the central procedural record. On December 3, 2024, Breslow struck additional pro se filings. On December 5, 2024, at a Young hearing with DDA Aziz Merchant and Carrico present, the court ordered competency evaluations, stayed proceedings, and restricted pro se filings. On December 9, 2024, a competency order was entered nunc pro tunc to December 5. On December 16–17, 2024, the court issued an OSC and revoked pretrial release, issuing a no-bail bench warrant.\n\nIn 2025: State filed a contempt motion over pro se filings (January 6); trial was vacated pending competency (January 22); three competency evaluations were conducted (Coyle, Pinkerman, Foerster — May through June 2025); defendant was found competent and remanded July 1, 2025. Counsel continued to cycle: Figueroa moved to withdraw June 2025 (granted August 21, 2025 with another no-bail warrant issued); Joel Merchant substituted July 2025.\n\nNote: CR22-2227 appears in prior system records but is not confirmed by any located source document. All source materials identify this case as CR23-0657. A supervised-release acknowledgment also references CR23-0687 — a clerical discrepancy preserved in the record.',
  case_number = 'CR23-0657'
WHERE id = 60001;
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 12: Unknown column 'narrative' in 'field list'
